benchmark.subtitle: Track rendering and computational pressure before runtime regressions.

welcome.title: Animator workspace ready
welcome.description: 加载一个 rig，并在一次流程中检查渲染、网格、裁剪、混合与物理。

warnings.spineVersion: 警告：此檔案使用 Spine 4.1。基準測試是為 Spine 4.2 設計的。版本將自動調整。

language.name: 繁體中文
language.changeLanguageDescription: 開啟語言選擇模態視窗

recommendations.reduceBoneDepth: 盡可能簡化結構以減少骨骼階層深度。
recommendations.reduceTotalBones: 考慮透過簡化骨架來減少骨骼總數。
recommendations.reduceVertices: 減少所有網格的頂點總數。
recommendations.minimizeDeformedMeshes: 最小化變形網格的數量，特別是高頂點數的網格。
recommendations.reduceWeightedMeshes: 減少具有骨骼權重的網格數量，因為它們需要更多計算。
recommendations.limitClippingMasks: 限制裁剪遮罩的數量，因為它們會顯著影響效能。
recommendations.simplifyComplexMasks: 簡化複雜的裁剪遮罩，使用更少的頂點（4個或更少是最佳的）。
recommendations.reduceNonNormalBlendModes: 減少非正常混合模式的數量以最小化渲染狀態變更。
recommendations.minimizeAdditiveBlendModes: 最小化加法混合模式的使用，因為它們特別昂貴。
recommendations.reducePhysicsConstraints: 物理約束特別昂貴 - 考慮減少它們的數量或複雜度。
recommendations.simplifyIkConstraints: 透過減少鏈長度或受影響的骨骼數量來簡化 IK 約束。
recommendations.optimizePathConstraints: 透過簡化路徑或減少受約束的骨骼數量來最佳化路徑約束。
recommendations.physicsUsage: Physics constraints are used in {{used}} out of {{total}} animations. Consider baking physics simulation for static animations.
recommendations.clippingFound: Clipping masks found in: {{names}}{{more}}. Consider using alpha blending or pre-masked textures instead.
recommendations.highVertexAnimations: {{count}} animations have high vertex counts (>500). Consider simplifying meshes for: {{names}}
recommendations.focusPoorAnimations: Focus optimization on these poor-performing animations: {{names}}
recommendations.multiIssueAnimations: {{count}} animations combine multiple expensive features. Consider simplifying: {{names}}
recommendations.performanceGenerallyGood: Performance is generally good across all animations. Minor optimizations may still be possible in specific areas.

excellent.description: 適用於所有平台和連續動畫

good.description: 在大多數平台上運作良好，但在低階設備上可能有問題

moderate.description: 可能造成效能下降，特別是多個實例時

poor.description: 在大多數設備上可能出現效能問題

interpretations.excellent: 適用於所有平台和連續動畫
interpretations.good: 在大多數平台上運作良好，但在低階設備上可能有問題
interpretations.moderate: 可能造成效能下降，特別是多個實例時
interpretations.poor: 在大多數設備上可能出現效能問題
interpretations.veryPoor: 在所有設備上都有顯著的效能問題

mesh.title: 網格統計

notes.title: 網格效能影響：
notes.vertexCount: 頂點數量：每個頂點都需要記憶體和處理時間。高頂點數（>50）有顯著影響。
notes.deformation: 變形：變形網格每幀需要額外計算 - 比靜態網格昂貴 {{factor}} 倍。
notes.boneWeights: 骨骼權重：每個骨骼權重增加矩陣乘法運算 - 每個加權頂點的影響增加 {{factor}} 倍。
notes.optimizationTip: 最佳化提示：對於變形或具有骨骼權重的網格使用較少的頂點。考慮對簡單形狀使用 Region attachments。

mesh.topMeshesNote: Showing top 10 meshes by vertex count. Total: {{count}} meshes

clipping.title: 裁剪遮罩
clipping.noMasks: 此骨架中未找到裁剪遮罩。

notes.title: 裁剪遮罩注意事項：
notes.highImpact: 高影響：裁剪遮罩是 Spine 渲染中最昂貴的操作之一
notes.vertexCount: 頂點數量：遮罩中的每個頂點都會增加計算成本
notes.optimalConfiguration: 最佳配置：盡可能使用三角形或四邊形遮罩（3-4 個頂點）
notes.gpuCost: GPU 成本：每個裁剪遮罩需要額外的 GPU 渲染通道（模板緩衝區操作）
notes.recommendation: 建議：每個骨架限制 2-3 個遮罩，每個遮罩少於 6 個頂點

blendMode.title: 混合模式
blendMode.slotsWithNonNormalTitle: 具有非正常混合模式的插槽：

notes.title: 混合模式注意事項：
notes.normalBlendMode: 正常混合模式：最有效率，需要單一渲染通道
notes.nonNormalBlendModes: 非正常混合模式：每個都需要單獨的渲染通道或著色器切換
notes.renderingCost: 渲染成本：每次混合模式變更都會強制渲染器「刷新」操作
notes.additiveBlend: 加法混合：由於混合計算，成本比正常混合高
notes.multiplyBlend: 乘法混合：類似於加法，需要額外的 GPU 操作
notes.recommendation: 建議：每個骨架限制 2 個非正常混合模式
notes.frameByFrameDescription: Values shown are the maximum number of blend modes visible at any single frame.
notes.impactDescription: Non-normal blend modes require additional GPU render passes.
notes.concurrentDescription: Having 10 blend modes where only 2 are visible at once is much better than having 10 visible simultaneously.
notes.optimizationDescription: Use normal blend mode when possible, pre-composite effects for static elements.

notes.title: 骨骼結構注意事項：
notes.boneCount: 骨骼數量：每個骨骼每幀都需要矩陣計算
notes.hierarchyDepth: 階層深度：深層階層會指數級增加變換複雜度
notes.recommendation: 建議：盡可能將骨骼階層保持在 5 層以下
notes.optimalStructure: 最佳結構：具有少量父子關係的扁平階層效能更好

formula.title: 效能影響公式：
formula.explanation: 其中 constraintImpact 是 IK、變換、路徑和物理約束影響的加權總和

notes.title: 約束注意事項：
notes.ikConstraints: IK 約束：成本隨骨骼鏈長度和迭代次數增加
notes.physicsConstraints: 物理約束：最高效能影響，特別是具有多個受影響屬性時
notes.pathConstraints: 路徑約束：複雜的路徑曲線和 ChainScale 旋轉模式更昂貴
notes.transformConstraints: 變換約束：每個受影響的屬性（位置、旋轉、縮放）都會增加計算開銷
notes.recommendation: 建議：盡可能謹慎使用約束，並在可能時使用最小的骨骼鏈

insight.subtitle: {{atlasPage}} • {{slotName}}

vertices.label: Vertices
vertices.highNote: High vertex density for this mesh.

weights.label: Weights
weights.weightedNote: Weighted mesh can increase update cost.

filterDeformed.label: Fix now: filter deformed meshes
filterDeformed.impact: Expected impact: isolate expensive deformation tracks.

isolateMesh.label: Fix now: isolate selected mesh
isolateMesh.impact: Expected impact: immediate canvas confirmation of highlighted mesh.

sendAtlasHint.label: Fix now: send atlas grouping hint
sendAtlasHint.impact: Expected impact: reduced page transitions near this mesh.

explainer.what: This mesh uses {{vertices}} vertices and {{triangles}} triangles on atlas page "{{atlasPage}}".
explainer.whyNowHigh: Vertex count is high enough to create avoidable cost spikes on dense animation frames.
explainer.whyNowHeadroom: Optimization headroom exists and can help stabilize worst-case playback.
explainer.howToFix: Reduce overclustered regions, trim hidden deformation keys, and simplify weighted areas where fidelity is not visible.
explainer.howToVerify: Run optimization preview, compare proof cards, and confirm visual quality in the highlighted mesh overlay.

infoPanel.emptyDescription: Hover or click a row to inspect attachment details here without covering the list.

insight.title: Slot #{{index}}: {{attachment}}
insight.subtitle: {{atlasPage}} • {{blendMode}}
insight.sample: {{slotName}} is now driving this explainer. Hover previews, click to pin, and Esc closes.

drawCalls.label: Draw Calls
drawCalls.note: Total calls in current draw order

filterPage.label: Fix now: filter page {{page}}
filterPage.impact: Expected impact: isolate contiguous runs to reveal merge opportunities.

isolate.label: Fix now: isolate selected draw call
isolate.impact: Expected impact: immediate visual verification on canvas.

atlasSuggestion.label: Fix now: atlas grouping suggestion
atlasSuggestion.impact: Expected impact: reduce page transitions with grouped pack targets.

explainer.what: This row draws "{{attachment}}" from "{{atlasPage}}" with "{{blendMode}}" blend.
explainer.whyNowBreak: It currently causes a batch break, so the frame is paying an extra draw call.
explainer.whyNowStable: It is part of a stable batch, so changes here should preserve existing ordering and blend behavior.
explainer.howToFix: Group adjacent regions onto the same atlas page and normalize blend mode where artist intent allows. Keep draw order blocks contiguous for shared materials.
explainer.howToVerify: Re-run this route and confirm lower page/blend break counts. Keep the selected row pinned and compare before/after proof cards.

loading.title: Loading draw-call metrics
loading.description: Parsing slots, blend modes, and atlas-page transitions.

partial.title: Partial parse detected
partial.description: Some rows resolve to unknown atlas pages. You can still inspect order and blend breaks.

noDrawableRows.title: No drawable rows found
noDrawableRows.description: The skeleton loaded, but no drawable region/mesh attachments are currently active.

infoPanel.emptyDescription: Hover or click a region to inspect packing and break-risk details here.

insight.title: {{regionName}}
insight.subtitle: {{pageName}} • {{width}}×{{height}}
insight.sample: {{regionName}} is now driving this explainer. Hover previews, click to pin, and Esc closes.

page.label: Atlas Page
page.note: Region occupies approximately {{pageShare}}% of this page footprint.

breakRisk.label: Break Risk
breakRisk.problematicNote: Current region is involved in draw call breaks.
breakRisk.stableNote: Current region is currently batching safely.

regionSize.label: Region Size
regionSize.note: Use this to evaluate whether grouping opportunities are realistic.

filterProblematic.label: Fix now: filter problematic regions
filterProblematic.impact: Expected impact: isolate break-causing regions first.

isolatePage.label: Fix now: isolate page {{pageName}}
isolatePage.impact: Expected impact: tighter packing decisions with less visual noise.

jumpDrawCalls.label: Fix now: jump to Draw Calls
jumpDrawCalls.impact: Expected impact: validate page break reduction on slot order.

explainer.what: This region "{{regionName}}" is packed on atlas page "{{pageName}}".
explainer.whyNowProblematic: It aligns with current draw-call break points and is a prime target for immediate batching wins.
explainer.whyNowStable: It is currently stable but still useful for validating future packing changes.
explainer.howToFix: Group regions that render sequentially onto the same page, prioritize high-frequency slots, and repack to reduce cross-page transitions.
explainer.howToVerify: Return to Draw Calls route and confirm lower page-break count while the retained selection stays focused on this region.

loading.title: Loading atlas metrics
loading.description: Scanning pages, regions, and draw-call break hotspots.

partial.title: Partial parse detected
